name: Comparison
summary: Class for comparison between two objects

methods.name: Congruent(l1p1, l1p2, l2p1, l2p2)

methods.remarks: compare 2D points of two 2D lines if are congruent

returns.doc: true if lines are congruent, otherwise false.

methods.remarks: compare 2D lines if are congruent

returns.doc: true if lines are congruent, otherwise false.

methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to an object.

params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

methods.name: DeterminePosition(polyline, point, tolerance)
methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to a 2D polyline. Returns position of point to the closest line of poly line

params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

returns.doc: eOnElement(between start and end points), eEqualToStartPoint, eEqualToEndPoint, eLeft, eRight, eAbove, eBelow

methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to a 2D polyline.
methods.remarks: Determine the relative position of a point to a 2D polyline.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

params.name: segment
params.doc: number of the segment of polyline in which was the point found (-1 - is not on polyline, 0 - first segm., ...)

returns.doc: eOnElement(between start and end points), eEqualToStartPoint, eEqualToEndPoint, eLeft, eRight, eAbove, eBelow
